CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS DESIREE LOPEZ AND DESI MILK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. This action is transferred to San Joaquin County and plaintiff shall pay all required transfer fees. No sanctions.

Stipulation and order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
